cover_caption: Sunday Robotics' ACT-1 robot performing table-clearing tasks in a home environment
source_title: ACT-1: A Robot Foundation Model Trained on Zero Robot Data

ai_summary.one_liner: Home robot foundation model trained on zero robot data via Embodiment Alignment — human hand data directly transferred to robot
ai_summary.problem: No internet-scale robot manipulation data exists; teleoperation creates a scaling deadlock
ai_summary.solution: Embodiment Alignment: match robot hardware to human form + Skill Capture Glove + Skill Transform (90% conversion rate)
ai_summary.key_result: Table-to-Dishwasher: 33 unique dexterous interactions, 21 objects, 130ft+ navigation; zero-shot generalization in unseen Airbnb homes
limitations: No systematic benchmarks or quantitative success rates

figures.caption: Sunday Robotics' ACT-1 robot performing table-clearing tasks in a home environment with the development team observing.
figures.caption_ko: Sunday Robotics의 ACT-1 로봇이 가정 환경에서 테이블 정리 작업을 수행하는 모습. 개발팀이 관찰하고 있다.

figures.caption: Close-up of Sunday Robotics' robot hands. Designed to achieve functional parity with human hands, the morphological alignment with the Skill Capture Glove is central to the Embodiment Alignment approach.
figures.caption_ko: Sunday Robotics의 로봇 손 클로즈업. 인간 손의 기능적 동등성(functional parity)을 목표로 설계된 하드웨어로, Skill Capture Glove와의 형태적 정렬(Embodiment Alignment)이 핵심이다.

figures.caption: Various Airbnb home environments where ACT-1 achieved zero-shot generalization. The robot performs tasks in unfamiliar environments using 3D map-conditioned navigation without any environment-specific training.
figures.caption_ko: ACT-1이 제로샷으로 일반화한 다양한 Airbnb 가정 환경들. 학습에 사용되지 않은 낯선 환경에서 3D 맵 기반 내비게이션으로 작업을 수행한다.
